'''Dalron IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] employed the [[Imperial Special Training Corps/Legends|Imperial Special Training Corps]] in the [[assault on Dalron IV]]. During the engagement, [[Davaire Colmar]] received a head injury. The Empire left him to die. Disillusioned, he wandered the countryside and eventually joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].
